# CHAOS Todo HTML Template

Literal, reusable skeleton for every generated view (`index.html`, `public-alpha.html`,
`v1.html`, `open-blockers.html`, `by-type.html`, `by-change.html`, and the dated
`todo-report-YYYY-MM-DD.html`). Placeholders are written `{{LIKE_THIS}}`; repeated blocks are
marked with `<!-- repeat: ... -->` comments. When generating a view, fill every placeholder and
**HTML-escape** all interpolated text (titles, paths, owners, snippets) per
`todo-html-view-contract.md`. No `<script>` tag may appear anywhere in the output.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<!-- Generated by chaos:todo. Do not edit manually. Durable todo items live under .chaos/todo/items/. -->
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>{{PAGE_TITLE}}</title>
<style>
  :root { color-scheme: light dark; }
  body { font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif; margin: 2rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #1a1a1a; background: #fff; }
  header.meta { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #555; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  h1 { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  h2 { margin-top: 2rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; padding-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .cards { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; margin: 1rem 0; }
  .card { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; min-width: 9rem; }
  .card .n { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; display: block; }
  .card .label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #555; }
  .priority-BLOCKER { color: #b00020; font-weight: 700; }
  .priority-HIGH { color: #b45f06; font-weight: 600; }
  .priority-MEDIUM { color: #856404; }
  .priority-LOW { color: #555; }
  table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; margin: 0.5rem 0 1.5rem; }
  th, td { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem; text-align: left; font-size: 0.9rem; vertical-align: top; }
  th { background: #f5f5f5; }
  code { background: #f5f5f5; padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.85em; }
  details { border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  summary { cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; }
  nav.anchors a { margin-right: 0.75rem; font-size: 0.85rem; }
  footer { margin-top: 2.5rem; padding-top: 0.75rem; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header class="meta">
  Generated: {{GENERATED_TIMESTAMP_ISO8601}} &middot;
  Source command: <code>{{SOURCE_COMMAND}}</code> &middot;
  Repository: {{REPO_PROVIDER}} / {{REPO_BRANCH}} (context confidence: {{REPO_CONTEXT_CONFIDENCE}})
</header>

<h1>{{PAGE_TITLE}}</h1>

<nav class="anchors">
  <a href="#dashboard">Dashboard</a>
  <a href="#next-actions">Recommended next</a>
  <a href="#open-items">Open items</a>
  <a href="#public-alpha">Public alpha</a>
  <a href="#v1">v1</a>
  <a href="#vnext">vNext</a>
  <a href="#later">Later</a>
  <a href="#duplicates">Duplicate candidates</a>
  <a href="#stale">Stale items</a>
  <a href="#coverage">Source coverage</a>
  <a href="#warnings">Warnings</a>
</nav>

<h2 id="dashboard">Dashboard</h2>
<div class="cards">
  <div class="card"><span class="n">{{COUNT_OPEN}}</span><span class="label">Open items</span></div>
  <div class="card"><span class="n">{{COUNT_BLOCKERS}}</span><span class="label">Blockers</span></div>
  <div class="card"><span class="n">{{COUNT_PUBLIC_ALPHA_BLOCKERS}}</span><span class="label">Public-alpha blockers</span></div>
  <div class="card"><span class="n">{{COUNT_V1_BLOCKERS}}</span><span class="label">v1 blockers</span></div>
  <div class="card"><span class="n">{{COUNT_STALE}}</span><span class="label">Stale items</span></div>
  <div class="card"><span class="n">{{COUNT_NEEDS_DECISION}}</span><span class="label">Needs decision</span></div>
</div>

<h2 id="next-actions">Recommended next actions</h2>
<ol>
  <!-- repeat: one <li> per recommended item -->
  <li><a href="{{ITEM_RELATIVE_LINK}}">{{ITEM_TITLE}}</a> — <span class="priority-{{ITEM_PRIORITY}}">{{ITEM_PRIORITY}}</span>, {{ITEM_TARGET}}</li>
</ol>

<h2 id="open-items">Open items</h2>
<table>
  <thead>
    <tr><th>ID</th><th>Title</th><th>Priority</th><th>Target</th><th>Type</th><th>Status</th><th>Owner</th><th>Item file</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <!-- repeat: one <tr> per open item -->
    <tr>
      <td><code>{{ITEM_ID}}</code></td>
      <td>{{ITEM_TITLE_ESCAPED}}</td>
      <td class="priority-{{ITEM_PRIORITY}}">{{ITEM_PRIORITY}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_TARGET}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_TYPE}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_STATUS}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_OWNER_ESCAPED}}</td>
      <td><a href="{{ITEM_RELATIVE_LINK}}">{{ITEM_FILENAME_ESCAPED}}</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<!-- repeat once per group: Public alpha (#public-alpha), v1 (#v1), vNext (#vnext), Later (#later) -->
<h2 id="{{GROUP_ANCHOR}}">{{GROUP_TITLE}}</h2>
<table>
  <thead>
    <tr><th>ID</th><th>Title</th><th>Priority</th><th>Type</th><th>Status</th><th>Source evidence</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><code>{{ITEM_ID}}</code></td>
      <td>{{ITEM_TITLE_ESCAPED}}</td>
      <td class="priority-{{ITEM_PRIORITY}}">{{ITEM_PRIORITY}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_TYPE}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_STATUS}}</td>
      <td>
        <!-- repeat: one link per sourceArtifact, escaped -->
        <a href="{{SOURCE_ARTIFACT_RELATIVE_LINK}}">{{SOURCE_ARTIFACT_PATH_ESCAPED}}</a>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<h2 id="duplicates">Duplicate candidates</h2>
<details>
  <summary>{{DUPLICATE_GROUP_SUMMARY_ESCAPED}}</summary>
  <p>{{DUPLICATE_GROUP_DETAIL_ESCAPED}}</p>
</details>
<!-- if none: -->
<p>No duplicate candidates detected in the last pass.</p>

<h2 id="stale">Stale items</h2>
<table>
  <thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Title</th><th>Last seen</th><th>Missing evidence reason</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><code>{{ITEM_ID}}</code></td>
      <td>{{ITEM_TITLE_ESCAPED}}</td>
      <td>{{ITEM_LAST_SEEN_AT}}</td>
      <td>{{STALE_REASON_ESCAPED}}</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
<!-- if none: -->
<p>No stale items.</p>

<h2 id="coverage">Source coverage</h2>
<table>
  <thead><tr><th>Source</th><th>Scanned</th><th>Candidates found</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
    <!-- repeat: one row per configured source in todo-source-contract.md -->
    <tr><td>{{SOURCE_LABEL}}</td><td>{{SOURCE_SCANNED_YES_NO}}</td><td>{{SOURCE_CANDIDATE_COUNT}}</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<h2 id="warnings">Warnings / confidence gaps</h2>
<ul>
  <!-- repeat: one <li> per warning (missing config, inferred defaults, LOW-confidence items, etc.) -->
  <li>{{WARNING_TEXT_ESCAPED}}</li>
</ul>
<!-- if none: -->
<p>No warnings.</p>

<footer>
  Generated artifact — not source of truth. Source of truth:
  <code>.chaos/todo/items/</code>. Regenerate with <code>chaos:todo --refresh</code>.
</footer>

</body>
</html>
```

## View-specific filtering

- `views/index.html` — all items, every section populated.
- `views/public-alpha.html` — filter item tables to `target: public-alpha`; omit the other
  target group sections or mark them "not applicable to this view."
- `views/v1.html` — filter to `target: v1`.
- `views/open-blockers.html` — filter to `priority: BLOCKER` and `status` in
  `open|in-progress|blocked|needs-decision`; may omit the by-target grouped sections.
- `views/by-type.html` — replace the by-target grouped sections with one section per `type`.
- `views/by-change.html` (optional) — one section per `relatedChanges` entry.
- `todo-report-YYYY-MM-DD.html` — same shape as `index.html`, dated snapshot for that run.
